arts.ttl: Bayern Munich still have not given up on Alexander Nübel becoming their #1
arts.sum: Nübel will have three upcoming big tests where Bayern will be watching him closely: Friday’s Stuttgart vs Bayern, as well as the two Germany vs Italy games next month, where he’s expected to start since [competing goalkeeper Oliver] Baumann is injured. Bayern bosses have yet to rule Alexander Nübel out as a potential successor to Manuel Neuer.

arts.ttl: Arsenal sent new Joshua Kimmich message as firm answer given on Bayern contract talks
arts.sum: Joshua Kimmich has emerged as a top target for Arsenal as his contract negotiations with Bayern Munich continue to stall, with further talks having taken place over the weekend

arts.ttl: Rumours linking Juventus star Kenan Yildiz to a Bayern Munich return are false
arts.sum: Recent rumours linking Juventus winger Kenan Yildiz to Bayern Munich have been revealed to be false. Reports have since emerged stating that Bayern has interest in bringing the player back to the club with a fee being negotiated in the 60 to 90 million Euro range, a rumour that has now been quashed.
